summary: Tested Vastgoed Kiosk viewport-relative CSS implementation. All kiosk screens fit on one screen WITHOUT scrollbars at both 1366x768 (small laptop) and 1920x1080 (large screen). Full payment flow tested: PIN entry -> Welcome -> Apartment Select -> Tenant Overview -> Payment Select -> Payment Confirm -> Cash Confirmation -> Receipt. All screens use viewport-relative CSS (clamp(), vh, vw) for dynamic scaling.
seed_data_creation: Used existing company KEWALBANSING with PIN 5678
context_for_next_testing_agent: All kiosk screens verified to fit on one screen without scrollbars. Viewport-relative CSS working correctly.
